candidates.why: This is the only explicit COGS-related D&A row above operating profit, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of revenue', so adding it separately would double count.

Label matches COGS D&A, but the row shows no values and is not needed. The populated COGS D&A component is already shown as 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues', which itself appears embedded in the selected 'Cost of revenue' total.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is the total 'Cost of revenue'. The visible D&A line is a sub-component of that total, not a separate same-level operating line to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row appears as a component under both selected SG&A parent rows ('Selling and distribution expenses' and 'General and administrative expenses'), so it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This amortization line is presented as a sub-component beneath 'General and administrative expenses', which is already selected in XSGA_COMPONENTS. Adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: This amortization row sits within the G&A section and appears to be part of the selected 'General and administrative expenses' total rather than a separate same-level line.

Although this is explicit R&D D&A above operating profit, it appears as a component of the selected 'Research and development expenses' row. Since that same R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding R&D D&A separately would be unnecessary and risks distortion/double counting.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the sum of 'Selling and distribution expenses', 'General and administrative expenses', and 'Research and development expenses'. All visible SG&A/R&D D&A rows appear nested within those selected totals, so no separate D&A row should be added.
